TextENGNew:
The gateway to Miotsukushi opens when you find—
X1 Incident Report 3 in the World of Afterwards
X2 Incident Report 4 in the World of Afterwards
X3 Incident Report 5 in the World of Afterwards
K6 A Fragment of Tokihogushi in the World of Elucidation
...Once you've seen all of the above, L3 A Fragment of Miotsukushi will appear in the World of Hope.
After selecting it, look at L4 The Gears Turn in Reverse, then look once more at L3 A Fragment of Miotsukushi, and the way forward will open.
changeReason: The fragment title 'L4 Reversing the Gears' was retranslated as 'L4 The Gears Turn in Reverse' (Japanese: 逆回りの歯車), which is a different rendering of a proper noun used as a navigation reference.
